g.text: 🔧 Add CI workflow and Update RISC-V toolchain to riscv32
🐛 Fix CoreMark get and print time
⚡️ Use enum as the type of instruction
Clean up temporary CodeQL file and update .gitignore
Address code review feedback: improve documentation for mcycle and clock config
Add mcycle CSR for CoreMark timer support and update portme files
🎨 Add ADDR_WIDTH to Standardization IROM and DRAM
Improve comments explaining synchronous DRAM timing design
Fix synchronous DRAM timing and Load-Use hazard handling
Implement synchronous DRAM support with pipeline modifications
